channel.title: Peruvian on Gourmand Syndrome
channel.description: Recent content in Peruvian on Gourmand Syndrome

item.title: The Inkan
item.description: Summary In a forever hunt for the best lomo saltado in NYC, this is another place we tried. This restaurant is located near Vernon where all the restaurants are, and it was relatively easy to walk in without reservations. I got the passion fruit juice with water which was basically passion fruit syrup with water and crushed ice. It was pretty good, but it was pretty obvious that you could probably make this at home.

item.title: Penthouse 808
item.description: Summary This bar / restaurant is located on the 6th floor in the Ravel Hotel in Long Island City. The view is fairly nice as you can see Midtown from the east, but it is not stellar since it sits slightly lower than the Queensborough bridge and there are 2 smoke stack obstructions as you look towards the Empire State building. We ordered some bottles of Rose and an entree.

item.title: Chirp
item.description: The lomo saltado was ok. The sauces cost 60 cents extra.

item.title: Chimu Bistro
item.description: The ceviche was good, but the lomo saltado was surprisingly pretty good. Beef slices were tender.

item.title: Jora
item.description: It was ok. Meat was overly chewy and tough. Price wasn’t too bad.

item.title: Baby Brasa
item.description: The chicken was good, but it’s a little pricey though. Seems to be a common theme nowadays.

item.title: Llama Inn
item.description: This place was pretty good. It’s expensive sorta, but the lomo saltado was decent.

item.title: Riko Peruvian Cuisine
item.description: So bad. The lomo saltado is really dry. Can’t seem to find a decent lomo saltado in NYC.

item.title: Coppelia
item.description: “Gourmet” lomo saltado is like paying $20 tacos. This is a ripoff and not worth the $20+. Good, but not great.

item.title: Senor Pollo
item.description: This place is pretty cheap. I remember both the lomo and pollo being a bit on the dry side, but it’s so cheap not much of a reason to complain I guess.
